accountConsoleSubtitle: Sarrafa bayanan ka, tsaron asusu, da haɗin MCP da AI.
activeSessionsDesc: Bincika zamomin browser da aka haɗa da wannan asusu.
adminOnlyNotice: Masu mallakar kungiya, admins, admins na tsaro, da admins na biyan kuɗi ne kaɗai za su iya amfani da wannan allo.
advancedUriSummary: Ci gaba: duba URI na saitin.
ariaNewInstanceUserName: Sunan nunawa sabon mai amfani instance
ariaNewInstanceUserPassword: Kalmar sirri sabon mai amfani instance
ariaRecoveryRegenConfirm: Tabbatar da sake ƙirƙirar lambar dawo da
ariaSearchServerWorkspaces: Nemo wuraren aiki na uwar garken
auditInviteEmailNotConfigured: Ba a saita imel ɗin gayyata ba
clipboardCopyFailed: Ba a iya kwafawa zuwa allon rubutu ba.
codeOrPasswordMismatch: Lambar ko kalmar wucewa ba daidai ba.
confirmDeleteUser: Share asusun {{label}}? Wannan mai amfani ba zai iya shiga ba.
confirmResetPassword: Sake saitin kalmar wucewa ga {{label}} zuwa kalmar wucewa ta wucin gadi kuma soke duk zaman?
deleteAdminRequired: Ana buƙatar damar admin na workspace.
deleteConfirmAriaLabel: Sunan workspace don tabbatar da gogewa
deleteWorkspaceConfirmLabel: Buga sunan workspace don goge shi.
deleteWorkspaceDesc: Shafuka, databases, da kuma bayanan fayil ana goge su tare da shi.
domainPolicyAddHint: Ƙara yankin da aka tabbatar don bambanta membobin ciki da baƙi na waje.
domainPolicyInviteVerified: Ana amfani da yankunan da aka tabbatar don gayyatar membobin ciki da admin. Ana iya gayyatar imel na waje a matsayin baƙi.
domainPolicyVerifiedRequired: Membobi da admin dole ne su yi amfani da yankin ƙungiyar da aka tabbatar. Imel na waje suna bin hanyar baƙi.
enterCodeDesc: Shigar da lambar kuma danna Aiwatar da tabbatarwa don kunna tabbatarwa mataki biyu kuma bayyana lambobin dawo da ku.
enterCodeOrPassword: Shigar da lambar mai tabbatarwa ko kalmar sirrinka.
enterCodeTitle: Shigar da lambar lambobi 6 na app
enterCurrentAndNewPassword: Shigar da kalmar sirrinka na yanzu da sabon.
enterCurrentPassphrase: Shigar da kalmar sirri ta yanzu don kashe kulle.
enterSixDigitCode: Shigar da lambar lambobi 6 da aka nuna a app ɗin mai tabbatarwa.
errAddGroupMember: An kasa ƙara memba na rukuni.
errCleanupUploads: An kasa tsabtace kayan da suka ƙare.
errLoadInstanceUsers: An kasa loda masu amfani da misali.
errRefreshSessionsFirst: Sake loda zaman tukuna don gane zaman yanzu.
errRestoreUser: An kasa maido da mai amfani.
errTransferOrgOwnership: An kasa canja wurin mallakar kungiya.
errUpdateInstanceAdmin: An kasa sabunta mai gudanar da misali.
errUpdateWorkspaceIcon: An kasa sabunta gunkin filin aiki.
errUpdateWorkspaceUrl: An kasa sabunta URL na filin aiki.
errUseSignOut: Yi amfani da fita don ƙare zama na yanzu.
instanceMeta: Sarrafa asusun uwar garke, rajista, da damar admin instance.
lastWorkspaceError: Ba za a iya share workspace na ƙarshe ba.
loadingImportJobs: Ana ɗora ayyukan shigo da bayanai...
localLockForgetWarning: Idan ka manta da kalmar sirri, gyare-gyaren da aka yi a wannan na'urar ba tare da haɗi ba waɗanda ba a daidaita su ba za su ɓace har abada - babu wata hanya ta dawo da su.
localLockOffDesc: Kulle ma'ajiyar gida na wannan na'urar tare da maɓalli na kalmar sirri. Ana sake saita ma'ajiyar gida lokacin da kake kunna ko kashe shi.
localLockOnDesc: Ana amfani da shi - bayanan gida na wannan na'urar an rufe su da maɓallin kalmar sirri.
lockDisabledNotice: An kashe kulle bayanan gida. An sake saita ma'ajiyar gida na wannan na'urar.
lockEnabledNotice: An kunna kulle bayanan gida. Bayanan gida na wannan na'urar yanzu suna da kariya ta kalmar sirrinka.
lockOffWithPass: Kashe kulle (ana buƙatar kalmar sirri ta yanzu)
lockPendingChanges: Wasu canje-canje suna jiran a daidaita. Ka sake gwadawa bayan daidaitawa ta ƙare yayin da kake kan layi.
lockUnavailable: Kulle gida ba ya samuwa a wannan browser.
lockWrongPassphrase: Kalmar wucewa ta yanzu ba daidai ba ce.
maintenanceRunSummary: {{scanned}} an duba · {{expired}} ya ƙare · {{failed}} ya gaza
manageRecoveryDesc: Ƙirƙiri sababbin lambobin idan ka rasa waɗanda aka adana. Lambobin da ba a yi amfani da su ba sun daina aiki.
manualTokenCreated: An ƙirƙiri alamar MCP ta hannu. Ba za a sake nuna wannan ƙimar ba.
manualTokensDesc: Don abokan cinikin MCP kawai ba tare da tallafin OAuth ba. Zabi haɗin OAuth ta hanyar URL MCP da ke sama idan mai yiwuwa.
mcpEmptyHint: Ƙara URL MCP a cikin saitunan app ɗin ChatGPT kuma zai bayyana a nan.
mcpMeta: Samun damar shafukan Hanji da ma'adanai daga apps na AI masu tallafin MCP.
mcpScopeNote: Iyakar tsoho ita ce kowane workspace da za ka iya shiga. Kowane aiki har yanzu yana sake duba izinin samfur da zaɓin workspace_id da kowane kayan aikin MCP ke buƙata.
mcpServerUrlDesc: Ƙara wannan adireshi ga abokan cinikin MCP kamar ChatGPT, Claude, da Cursor. Abokan ciniki masu iya OAuth ana tura su zuwa allon amincewa na Hanji ta atomatik.
mcpSnippetsDesc: Kwafi saitin da aka shirya don abokin cinikin MCP ɗin ka. Cikakkun jagororin suna cikin mcp/docs/guides.
mcpUrlUnavailable: Ba a iya loda URL MCP ba.
memberAddFailed: Ba a iya ƙara memba ba.
memberInvitationRemoveFailed: Ba a iya cire gayyatar ba.
memberRemoveFailed: Ba a iya cire memba ba.
mfaDisableFailed: An kasa kashe tabbatarwa mataki biyu.
mfaDisabledDesc: Ƙara lambar app tantancewa don kare shiga kalmar sirri.
mfaEnabledDesc: Ana buƙatar lambar app tantancewa bayan shiga kalmar sirri.
mfaEnabledNotice: An kunna tabbatarwa mataki biyu. Ajiye lambobin dawo da ku.
mfaEnrollFailed: An kasa fara saitin tabbatarwa mataki biyu.
mfaSetupIntro: Ƙara Hanji zuwa app tantancewa, sannan shigar da sabuwar lambar lambobi 6 da app ke nunawa.
mfaVerifyFailed: An kasa tabbatar da lambar tabbatarwa mataki biyu.
needAnotherWorkspace: Kana iya share wannan ne kawai idan akwai wani wurin aiki.
newManualTokenDesc: Ana nunawa sau ɗaya kawai. Manna shi a saitunan abokin ciniki da ke buƙata.
newPassphraseMismatch: Tabbatarwar sabon jumlar sirri bai yi daidai ba.
newPassphraseTooShort: Sabon jumlar sirri dole ne ya kasance aƙalla haruffa 8.
newPasswordMismatch: Tabbatarwar sabon kalmar sirri bai yi daidai ba.
newPasswordTooShort: Sabon kalmar sirri dole ne ya kasance aƙalla haruffa 8.
noAiApps: Babu aikace-aikacen AI da aka haɗa tukuna.
noContentToTransfer: Babu abun da za a canjawa wuri
noMatchingAudit: Babu rajistar audit da ta dace.
noOrganizationYet: Babu wata kungiya da aka haɗa tukuna.
noticeNoOtherSessions: Babu wasu zaman da za a soke.
onlyAdminsDelete: Mana’ajan sararin aiki ne kawai za su iya goge shi.
orgAdminRequired: Ana buƙatar damar gudanar da kungiya.
orgSecurityAdminRequired: Ana buƙatar damar admin na tsaro na kungiya.
ownerTransferFailed: An kasa canja mai sararin aiki.
passphraseChangedNotice: An canza kalmar wucewa ta kulle gida.
passphraseMismatch: Tabbatarwar kalmar wucewa bai dace ba.
passphraseTooShort: Dole kalmar wucewa ta kasance aƙalla haruffa 8.
passwordChangedNotice: An canza kalmar sirri. Sauran na'urori suna buƙatar sake shiga.
passwordDesc: Tabbatar da kalmar sirrinka na yanzu, sannan canza ta zuwa sabuwa.
qrAlt: Lambar QR tabbatarwa mataki biyu don karantawa ta Google Authenticator
qrCodeFailed: Ba a iya ƙirƙiri lambar QR ba. Yi amfani da maɓallin shigar da hannu a ƙasa.
qrFallbackSummary: Ba za a iya karanta lambar QR ba?
recoveryCodeMismatch: Duba lambar maido da damanka ka sake gwadawa.
recoveryCodesCopied: An kwafa lambobin maido da dama.
recoveryCodesDesc: Ajiye waɗannan yanzu. Ana iya amfani da kowace lamba sau ɗaya idan app ɗin tabbatarwanka baya aiki.
recoveryCodesKeepSafe: Wataƙila ba za ka iya ganin waɗannan lambobin ba kuma, don haka adana su a cikin manajan kalmar sirri ko wani wuri mai aminci.
recoveryFileCreated: An ƙirƙiri fayil ɗin lambar maido da dama.
recoveryRegenerateFailed: An kasa sake ƙirƙiri lambobin maido da dama.
recoveryRegeneratedNotice: An sake ƙirƙiri lambobin maido da dama.
resetPasswordFailed: An kasa sake saita kalmar sirri.
scanQrDesc: Ƙara sabon asusu a cikin app kamar Google Authenticator, 1Password, ko Authy.
scanQrTitle: Karanta lambar QR a cikin app ɗin tabbatarwa.
serverAuditMeta: Bincika ayyukan admin na instance da abubuwan duba na ƙungiyar gaba ɗaya.
serverBackupMeta: Sauke kwafin bayanan samfur kuma duba abin da za a iya maido.
serverConsoleSubtitle: Sarrafa asusu, rajista, da tantancewa a cikin wannan instance gaba ɗaya.
serverJobsMeta: Bi matakai, gazawa, da matsayin taswirar ayyukan ƙaura na Notion a cikin server gaba ɗaya.
serverOverviewMeta: Duba asusu, workspaces, fayiloli, da matsayin shigo da abu gaba ɗaya a wuri guda.
serverSecurityMeta: Sarrafa admins na instance, asusun da ba a amfani da su, sake saitin kalmar sirri, da soke zaman.
serverSystemMeta: Duba ƙimomin muhallin aiki da abubuwan dogaron admin na EdgeBase da console na server ke maye gurbinsu.
serverUsageMeta: Duba matsayin fayiloli, ma'ajiya, da sakamakon sharewa gaba ɗaya a server.
serverWorkspacesMeta: Duba masu mallaka, membobi, shafuka, fayiloli, da matsayin shigo da abu na kowane workspace.
sharingPublicWeb: Rarraba gidan yanar gizo na jama'a
signupHelpInviteOnly: Imel gayyata kawai zai iya ƙirƙirar asusu a wannan instance.
signupHelpPublic: Sabbin masu amfani suna iya ƙirƙirar asusun kansu a wannan instance.
signupHelpVerified: Imel da aka tabbatar da yankin ko gayyata kawai zai iya ƙirƙirar asusu a wannan instance.
snapshotDownloaded: An sauke snapshot na uwar garken.
storageLimitInvalid: Iyakar ajiya dole ta zama 0 ko fiye.
temporaryPasswordCopied: An kwafi kalmar sirri ta wucin gadi.
totpCodeMismatch: Lambar tabbatarwa ba daidai ba. Duba lamba 6 sabuwa a app ka, sannan a sake gwadawa.
unknownDevice: Na'urar da ba a sani ba
workspaceConsoleSubtitle: Sarrafa membobin, manufofi, tsaro, da amfani na wurin aiki na yanzu.
workspaceSecurityMeta: Sarrafa rabawa ga jama'a, gayyata ta waje, da manufofin zazzage fayil.
workspaceUrlSaving: Ana ajiye URL na wurin aiki...
signupHelpClosed: Admin na instance ne kawai zai iya ƙirƙirar asusu; babu damar yin rajista da kanka.
